Description.en: Something dark awaits you in the forests of Ogham...
Description.zh: 欧甘的森林之中，某种黑暗的力量正在蠢蠢欲动……

Description.en: Once verdant plains now course with sands red and black.
Description.zh: 曾经绿意盎然的大平原，如今只剩下猩红与黑暗的飞沙。

Description.en: Wild jungles have reclaimed the ruins of the Vaal Empire.
Description.zh: 瓦尔帝国的残垣断壁，再次没入了蛮荒的雨林。

Description.en: The sea holds many secrets. Those who seek must take care what they find.
Description.zh: 海洋中隐藏着无数秘密，探秘者苦苦追寻的，却不知是福是祸。

Description.en: The thrice-damned isle of Oriath has not been fully abandoned after all...
Description.zh: 奥瑞亚岛虽三度遭遇劫难，却并不是荒无人烟之地……

Description.en: Warriors of many different tribes must gather to save the world.
Description.zh: 来自诸多部族的战士必须聚集起来拯救世界。

Description.en: What you will do, you have always done.
